name: GH_LineParser
summary: Provides basic functionality for the custom ReadFile component script parsing.

constructors.name: GH_LineParser
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_LineParser class

methods.name: ParseLine
methods.signature: public abstract Object ParseLine(string line, ref GH_LineParserAction action)
methods.summary: Parse a line of text and convert it to custom data.

params.name: action
params.doc: Set the action to take after this function returns. The default is Include.

returns.doc: The data represented by the line.
